swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/context.rs

Coverage: 72.7% (189/260 lines)

Uncovered functions:

- append_task_log / append_tag_log / append_actor_log / append_column_log / append_swimlane_log / append_board_log / append_log (activity logging, lines 362-417)

What to test: Open a KanbanContext in a temp dir, verify board metadata loads. Test append_log writes entries and read_activity reads them back. Test lock acquires and releases. Test write/delete generic entity operations.
Add tests for KanbanContext open/find and activity logging
